name: Macadamia Shogi
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Macadamia Shogi: H. G. Muller's factor-two shrink of the historic Maka Dai Dai Shogi -- a 13x13 board, 48 pieces a side of 26 types with 11 more via promotion, DROP-LESS. Its defining twist is PROMOTION BY CAPTURE: a piece may promote (to a fixed form) only on the turn it captures, and promotion is FORCED when it captures an already-promoted piece. Capturing a Priest/Pirate turns the capturer into the game-dominating Saint/Ghost, so those pieces virtually never leave play. The Lion double-moves, the Wolf (Lion Dog) triple-moves and can annihilate three pieces at once, the Hook Mover and Capricorner make a 90-degree turn mid-slide, a King promotes to an all-powerful Emperor (Universal Leaper) and the Drunk Elephant to a second King. Win by capturing ALL enemy royals.
